We always love stopping here when we visit SF! The sights and smells can’t be beat. There are ladies sitting inside the store folding fortune cookies in front of the line. Staff greets you with samples. They always load us up with free bags and free cookies. Honestly, I’m not a huge fortune cookie fan UNLESS THEY ARE FROM THIS STORE 🥠🧡🤌🏻

Interesting place to visit in china town if you like fortune cookies. Was fun to watch them being made and being given loads of hot free samples of the cookies. We ended up spending $80 lol its not cheap in there but worth the experience even if short.
Cool little spot where you see how fortune cookies are made. They even serve you a sample fortune cookie fresh out of the machine. Definitely a must visit when visiting Chinatown.
